name: GT-sup-states
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:394-398 (1.2.5 Lemma), VERBATIM: "Let A be an order unit space and  $a \in A$ . Then we have: (i)  $a \ge 0$  if and only if  $\rho(a) \ge 0$  for all  $\rho \in S(A)$ . (ii)  $||a|| = \sup_{\rho \in S(A)} |\rho(a)|$ ." Gives norm-monotonicity in an order unit space: if 0<=x<=y then for every state rho, 0<=rho(x)<=rho(y)<=||y||, so ||x||=sup_rho rho(x)<=||y||.
